title: Deep integration: 6 services wired into user-facing endpoints + frontend display

observation.gap_identified: Multiple backend services existed as standalone endpoints but were not integrated into the main user-facing responses (screener, portfolio/analyze, market-status). Frontend had no display for economic surprise, sector rotation, changepoint, or per-stock analytics in the screener table.

implementation.feature_built: Wired 6+ standalone services into main endpoints: (1) Screener now returns per-stock liquidity tier/score, momentum rank/percentile, RSI, trend direction, max drawdown, current drawdown. (2) Portfolio /analyze now returns stress test summary (6 historical crisis scenarios with drawdown %) and portfolio-level drawdown analysis (rolling returns, recovery stats). (3) Market-status now returns Bayesian changepoint detection (regime shift alert). (4) Frontend screener table shows 4 new columns: RSI, Trend, Momentum%, Liquidity. (5) Frontend portfolio page shows stress test + drawdown analysis cards. (6) Market banner shows economic surprise, changepoint, and cycle phase indicators. (7) Added pair analysis API functions to frontend. (8) Updated PortfolioAnalysis type with tail_risk, attribution, risk_contributions, copula_risk, stress_test, portfolio_drawdowns.

limitations: Screener per-stock liquidity/drawdown adds latency since each stock fetches extra data in parallel workers
Survival model not integrated (requires pre-training, not a simple function call)
Portfolio stress test adds yfinance calls which may slow /analyze for large portfolios
No new tests written for the integration wiring (existing tests cover the underlying services)
assessment.self_critique: Could have added a simple toggle or lazy-loading for the heavier screener enrichments to keep the fast path fast. The screener enrichments (liquidity, drawdown per stock) may add 10-20s to an already slow endpoint. Should consider caching these per-stock analytics separately.

next_steps: Add caching layer for per-stock liquidity/drawdown in screener to reduce latency
Display VIX term structure state in the market banner
Wire survival model into crash timeline page (requires training pipeline)
Add frontend display for copula tail risk and attribution in portfolio page
Consider lazy-loading heavy screener columns via a separate enrichment endpoint
